level.setting: An abandoned, mist-shrouded citadel at the edge of the world.

encounters.hazard: Freezing mist that drains health over time.

pickup.name: Ancient Cinder Flask
pickup.effect: Enhances fire-based critical damage against icy foes.

encounters.trigger: Upon defeating the Sentinel, the gate to the courtyard unlocks.

encounters.hazard: Collapsing pillars falling from the ceiling.

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Amulet
pickup.effect: Projects a beam of holy light capable of weakening shadow-bound armor.

encounters.trigger: The creature's death shatters the seal on the Cathedral door.

encounters.hazard: Patches of necrotic sludge that slow movement.

pickup.name: Sanctum Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the path to the main ritual chamber.

encounters.trigger: The Knight falls, dropping the key to the Inner Sanctum where the Boss resides.

boss.name: Malakor the Ash-Caller
boss.weakness: Ancient Cinder Flask combined with Sun-Touched Amulet light
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while managing the encroaching void fire.

level.objective: Purge the darkness from the Sanctum and defeat the ritualist.
level.reward: The Eternal Flame Orb: A relic granting infinite mana regeneration.

level.setting: A vibrant, magical forest filled with floating flora and friendly mythical creatures.

encounters.hazard: Thick patches of sleepy fog that slow movement.

pickup.name: Glowing Firefly Jar
pickup.effect: Provides bright illumination and attracts nocturnal creatures.

encounters.trigger: A playful tap from the staff disturbs the golem, causing it to lose balance and fall, revealing a path to the Sunlit Pond.

enemy.name: Puddlepup
enemy.weakness: Glowing Firefly Jar (Pickup from Misty Fern Grove)

encounters.hazard: Slippery lily pads that require careful navigation.

pickup.name: Ancient Whistle
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency sound that resonates with crystalline structures.

encounters.trigger: Opening the jar causes the light to confuse the pup, leading it to run into the bushes and clear the path to the Crystal Cave.

encounters.hazard: Sharp crystal shards that deal chip damage if stepped on.

pickup.name: Dragonscale Crest
pickup.effect: Symbolizes authority over draconic creatures.

encounters.trigger: Blowing the whistle shatters the surrounding crystals, trapping the bat in a harmless prism and opening the gate to the Boss Arena.

boss.name: Crystalline Drake
boss.victory_condition: Show the Dragonscale Crest to soothe the drake, causing it to drop the Spirit Essence and fly away peacefully.

level.objective: Retrieve the Lost Spirit Essence to restore balance to the forest.
level.reward: The Spirit Essence and the title of Forest Warden.

level.setting: An ancient, subterranean dungeon beneath a cursed cathedral.

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Amulet
pickup.effect: Increases damage against shadows by 25%

encounters.trigger: Approaching the altar of bones triggers the skeletal awakening.

encounters.hazard: Floor tiles that crumble if stood on for more than three seconds

pickup.name: Vial of Pure Silver
pickup.effect: Can be applied to a weapon to bypass necrotic armor

encounters.trigger: Walking into the center of the room causes the shadows to solidify.

encounters.hazard: Toxic green mist that drains 5 health every turn

pickup.name: Crystal Keystone
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Inner Sanctum door

encounters.trigger: Opening the main chest signals the knight to stand guard.

boss.name: Soul-Thief Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Use the Crystal Keystone to break his soul-binding shield before striking

level.objective: Purify the Corrupted Catacombs and defeat the Soul-Thief
level.reward: The Paladin's Crest of Eternal Light

level.setting: A crumbling tower suspended in an endless void.

pickup.name: Essence of Clarity
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible barriers.

encounters.trigger: Opening the main gate attracts the Specter, leading to the spiral staircase.

encounters.hazard: Gravity shifts that pull player toward spikes.

pickup.name: Void-Piercing Gem
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to cosmic entities.

encounters.trigger: Stepping onto the pressure plate creates a bridge to the sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Poison gas that depletes health rapidly.

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Freezes boss movement for 5 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Mimic illuminates the ritual circle for the final boss.

boss.name: The Faceless Archon
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Key to shatter the Archon's mask.

level.objective: Sever the link between the spirit realm and the Spire.
level.reward: The Archon's Sight, an artifact granting true-sight.

level.setting: An enchanted, peaceful forest sanctuary suffering from a sudden corruption.

pickup.name: Blessed Dew
pickup.effect: Restores 10 health and grants temporary immunity to frost.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the spriggan reveals the path to the Sunlit Pond.

pickup.name: Ember Stone
pickup.effect: Enchants the weapon with fire.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the heron allows the water level to drop, exposing the Ancient Ruin entrance.

pickup.name: Celestial Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the sentinel unlocks the inner sanctum doors.

boss.name: Shadow Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Use the Celestial Key to break the guardian's tether to the shadow realm.

level.objective: Restore the tranquility of the grove by purifying the Heart of the Forest.
level.reward: The Warden's Laurel, a crown that boosts passive regeneration.

level.setting: A realm fracturing under the weight of excessive magical volatility.

pickup.name: Essence of Pure Flame
pickup.effect: Imbues your weapon with fire damage.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel causes the bridge to collapse, dropping you into the lower catacombs.

pickup.name: Ancient Void Stone
pickup.effect: Allows the user to phase through solidified shadow barriers.

encounters.trigger: The Revenant's death shatters the necromantic ward protecting the inner sanctum gate.

pickup.name: Core of Chaos
pickup.effect: Neutralizes unstable chaotic energy.

encounters.trigger: Upon destruction, the Horror creates a singularity that teleports the player directly to the Boss's throne room.

boss.name: Lord of Entropy
boss.victory_condition: Use the Core of Chaos to expose his physical form, then land the final blow.

level.objective: Suppress the chaotic rift before the world destabilizes.
level.reward: The Berserker's Eternal Rage: A permanent damage buff for all future encounters.

level.setting: A decaying, underground mausoleum forgotten by time.

encounters.hazard: Toxic green fog that drains health over time.

pickup.name: Cursed Bone Fragment
pickup.effect: Increases damage against skeletal constructs.

encounters.trigger: Opening the crypt door causes the spirit to shriek, shattering a nearby seal.

encounters.hazard: Pressure plates that fire poison darts.

pickup.name: Bottled Banshee Wail
pickup.effect: Stuns armored enemies temporarily.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the warrior collapses the bridge leading to the inner sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Spikes rising from the floor rhythmically.

pickup.name: Lich's Phylactery Shard
pickup.effect: Explodes when thrown at magical beings.

encounters.trigger: The Golem's death awakens the dormant lich king upon the throne.

boss.name: The Silent Lich King
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while utilizing the shard.

level.objective: Exorcise the Ancient Lich from the sanctum.

level.setting: A scorched, endless desert scattered with ancient architectural ruins

pickup.name: Sun-Bleached Bone Shard
pickup.effect: Deals holy damage over time to undead creatures

encounters.trigger: Approaching the only standing tree in the desert field

pickup.name: Cursed Obsidian Eye
pickup.effect: Reveals structural weaknesses and hidden paths

encounters.trigger: Stepping onto the pressure plate at the tower base

pickup.name: Ethereal Heart
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to darkness-based attacks

encounters.trigger: Attempting to climb the ladder to the gate mechanism

boss.name: Void Incarnate
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ethereal Heart to shatter the Void Incarnate's core while it is channeling

level.objective: Seal the Abyss Gate before the void consumes the desolate wastes
level.reward: The Ranger's legacy, carved into the stone of the wasteland for eternity

level.setting: The derelict space station 'Icarus-7' drifting near a black hole.

encounters.hazard: Flickering emergency lights creating blind spots

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Dissolves organic armor plating.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the junction causes the security lockdown to fail.

pickup.name: High-Frequency Sonic Emitter
pickup.effect: Disrupts cybernetic targeting systems.

encounters.trigger: Opening the cryo-chamber reveals the infected core.

encounters.hazard: Exposed live wiring on the floor

pickup.name: Remote Detonation Key
pickup.effect: Overloads the boss's central power core.

encounters.trigger: Activating the reactor manual override activates the final guardian.

boss.name: Void-Core Motherboard
boss.victory_condition: Insert the key into the mainframe during the boss's overheat phase.

level.objective: Escape the derelict station by overloading the reactor.
level.reward: The Station Escape Pod Access Code.

level.setting: A decaying, silent space station drifting in the void of deep space.

pickup.name: Phase-Shift Capacitor
pickup.effect: Allows the player to bypass energy barriers.

encounters.trigger: Opening the main Airlock activates the security drones.

pickup.name: Void-Core Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Stabilizes unstable reality rifts in the reactor room.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the cryo-pod control panel awakens the sentry.

pickup.name: Chronos-Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Master Boss Chamber.

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the reactor override key triggers the final defense system.

boss.name: Entropy Archon
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos-Key to force the Archon into a single timeline, rendering it vulnerable.

level.objective: Restore the flow of time to the derelict station by overriding the central reactor core.
level.reward: The ability to manipulate local time flow at will.

level.setting: A crumbling orbital research facility during a solar flare event

pickup.name: Conductive Core
pickup.effect: Increases electrical discharge range

encounters.trigger: Destroying the construct shorts out the security locks for the Cargo Bay

encounters.hazard: Gravity wells that pull the player toward hazards

pickup.name: High-Voltage Relay
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with damaged circuit breakers

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Elite destabilizes the reactor, opening the path to the Core

pickup.name: Overclocked Capacitor
pickup.effect: Doubles storm damage

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Sentinel's armor triggers the final lockdown sequence

boss.name: The Storm-Breaker Titan
boss.victory_condition: Channel electricity into the Titan until the capacitor explodes

level.objective: Overload the central reactor to purge the station of corruption

level.setting: An abandoned, silent space station drifting on the edge of a black hole.

encounters.hazard: Flickering overhead sparks dealing minor damage.

pickup.name: Cryo-Fluid Canister
pickup.effect: Can freeze thermal-based defenses.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the central terminal initiates a reboot sequence, waking the drone.

pickup.name: Overclocked Battery Core
pickup.effect: Increases energy conductivity.

encounters.trigger: Attempting to hack the airlock door causes it to malfunction and summon the drone.

pickup.name: Master Override Module
pickup.effect: Disables the central security system.

encounters.trigger: Downloading the master access key draws the final guardian from the shadows.

boss.name: Central AI Core 'Mother'
boss.victory_condition: Insert the module into the terminal to force a hard shutdown.

level.objective: Retrieve the station's Master Override Module and neutralize the runaway AI core.
level.reward: The station's experimental tech blueprints and safe passage home.

level.setting: The derelict orbital station 'Aethelgard' orbiting a dying star

pickup.name: Overload Chip
pickup.effect: Short-circuits electrical shielding on robotic enemies

encounters.trigger: Opening the encrypted vault reveals a data-spike trap

pickup.name: Thermal Cloak Disruptor
pickup.effect: Reveals cloaked enemies and weakens thermal armor

encounters.trigger: Accessing the main security terminal alerts the facility guards

enemy.name: Genetic Stalker
enemy.weakness: Thermal Cloak Disruptor (Pickup from Maintenance Shaft 9)

pickup.name: Neuro-Toxic Core
pickup.effect: Stabilizes the boss's bio-mechanical heart, neutralizing its regeneration

encounters.trigger: Purging the lab containment field triggers the emergency lockdown

boss.name: Synthetix Prime
boss.victory_condition: Disable the central processing core while the boss is stunned by the toxin

level.objective: Infiltrate the bio-tech facility and eliminate the rogue AI administrator

level.setting: A derelict deep-space research vessel drifting near a black hole.

encounters.hazard: Leaking liquid nitrogen pipes causing periodic freezing damage.

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Dissolves reinforced metal plating and armor.

encounters.trigger: Opening the cryo-pod initiates a lockdown sequence in the hallway ahead.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage electrical wires sparking randomly.

pickup.name: Hyper-Conductive Catalyst
pickup.effect: Empowers alchemical reactions with electrical charges.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone forces the emergency blast doors to the laboratory to open.

encounters.hazard: Unstable gravity fluctuations throwing debris across the room.

pickup.name: Singularity Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Neutralizes unstable gravitational fields.

encounters.trigger: Extracting the core from the mass powers up the main containment unit for the boss.

boss.name: The Architect's Monstrosity
boss.victory_condition: Use the stabilizer to implode the boss's containment field while health is below 50.

level.objective: Purge the station of rogue biological experiments and retrieve the core sample.

level.setting: A decaying, abandoned space station repurposed into a malfunctioning amusement park

pickup.name: Gravity-Defying Boots
pickup.effect: Allows the player to hover momentarily

encounters.trigger: Stealing a handful of glowing space-corn from the bot's inventory

pickup.name: Holographic Decoy Mirror
pickup.effect: Distracts mechanical enemies

encounters.trigger: Attempting to sneak through the gate without a valid pass

pickup.name: Over-Sized Magnet
pickup.effect: Used to disable heavy machinery

encounters.trigger: Tripping over an invisible laser fence while sneaking

boss.name: The Carnival Master (A giant AI clown head)
boss.victory_condition: Disable the Master's control circuits using the magnet to shut down the carnival systems

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen Golden Prize Ticket from the Carnival Master
level.reward: The Golden Prize Ticket, which grants access to a lifetime supply of space-soda

level.setting: An ancient, floating space station orbiting a dying nebula.

encounters.hazard: Zero-gravity zones that float the player into turret sightlines

pickup.name: Compressed Grav-Stone
pickup.effect: Increases knockback force by 200% against heavy armor

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentry stabilizes the gravity well, unlocking the Archives of Dust.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris that deals massive damage if hit by shockwaves

pickup.name: Resonant Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Causes structural enemies to vibrate and shatter upon hit

encounters.trigger: Shattering the golem reveals a hidden conduit powering the Observatory Core.

encounters.hazard: Expanding energy rings that reduce movement speed

pickup.name: Singularity Shard
pickup.effect: Permanently absorbs boss-level energy shields

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Weaver creates a bridge to the Final Nebula Gate.

boss.name: The Architect of Silence
boss.victory_condition: Use the Singularity Shard to pierce the Architect's final barrier.

level.objective: Seal the Nebula Gate to stop the corruption of the celestial garden.
level.reward: The ability to manipulate local gravity fields freely.
